niḥ-√sru P. -sravati, to flow out or off,  ŚBr.  rise from (abl.),  Cat. ;
to disappear or be lost to or from (abl.),  Āpast.  :
Caus. -srāvayati, to cause to flow out (as a pond),  MBh. ;
to cause to disappear from or be lost to or from (abl.),  Āpast.
